data.title: Binance under scrutiny over response to South Korean police request in Upbit breach case
data.description:
South Korean police asked Binance to freeze Solana tokens linked to the Upbit breach on Nov. 27. Binance reportedly froze about $55,000 after a delay of roughly 15 hours. The Upbit breach involved unauthorised Solana-based withdrawals worth about $36 million
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/binance-under-scrutiny-over-response-to-south-korean-police-request-in-upbit-breach-case/

data.title: AMINA Bank Integrates Ripple Payments to Cut Cross-Border Crypto Friction
data.description:
Ripple has partnered with FINMA-regulated AMINA Bank, making it the first European bank to adopt Ripple Payments for near real-time cross-border transactions.

The post AMINA Bank Integrates Ripple Payments to Cut Cross-Border Crypto Friction first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/12/12/amina-banks-integrates-ripple-pay/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=amina-banks-integrates-ripple-pay

data.title: Firedancer upgrade goes live on Solana main net
data.description:
Firedancer launched its full version on the Solana main net. The new validator client arrived after three years in development by the Jump Crypto team.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/firedancer-upgrade-on-solana-main-net/

data.title: Crypto Market Funding Rates Shift to Neutral
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges have shifted from bearish to neutral. The specific funding rates for mainstream cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying chart.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee. It adjusts the cost or profit of holding contracts to keep contract prices close to the asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% signifies a baseline rate. When the rate exceeds 0.01%, it suggests a generally bullish market sentiment. Conversely, a rate below 0.005% indicates a bearish market sentiment.

data.title: Garantex Reemerges as Russia Builds Sanctions-Resistant Crypto Infrastructure
data.description:
Blockchain forensics show that sanctioned Russian crypto exchange Garantex has rebuilt a payout system and is moving millions through mixers and cross-chain bridges.

data.description:
The organization is turning to bitcoin and digital assets to overcome delays in traditional banking channels during crises.

data.title: Wrapped XRP to debut on Solana; Here’s how XRP price reacted
data.description:
Hex Trust, a regulated institutional asset custodian, announced on December 12 that it would issue wrapped XRP (wXRP) on Solana (SOL), among other networks, including Ethereum (ETH).  A fully collateralized version of the native token built for use beyond the XRP Ledger (XRPL), wrapped XRP can be redeemed 1:1 for XRP at any time. The rollout is set to begin with more than $100 million in value locked, giving traders and institutions immediate liquidity from day one. 🚀 HUGE news for the #XRP ecosystem! @Hex_Trust is launching and securing Wrapped XRP (wXRP), a 1:1-backed representation of native XRP, issued on @LayerZero_Core OFT Standard, to unlock #DeFi utility across multiple blockchains, starting with @Solana
source: https://finbold.com/wrapped-xrp-to-debut-on-solana-heres-how-xrp-price-reacted/

data.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest picks up $15.4 million in Robinhood shares and more of its own Bitcoin ETF
data.description:
The investment firm continues to rebalance its fund weightings amid market volatility, with Robinhood stock closing down 9% on Thursday.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/382324/cathie-wood-ark-invest-buys-robinhood-shares-own-bitcoin-etf?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: India's Central Bank Deputy Governor Discusses Anonymity in Retail CBDC Use
data.description: According to PANews, India's central bank deputy governor, Sankar, has stated that anonymity is inevitable in the retail use of central bank digital currencies (CBDCs). He emphasized that legal support is necessary to anonymize CBDC transactions, and tools are available to facilitate this process.

data.description:
The move breaks from years of regulatory ambiguity and signals that Washington wants simpler, more functional rules as crypto enters […] The post CFTC Scraps Outdated Rules in Push Toward Full Crypto Legalization appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology Releases Blockchain Standards for Public Consultation
data.description: According to Foresight News, China's Ministry of Industry and Information Technology has announced the completion of drafting 11 recommended national standards related to the electronics industry. These standards include guidelines for the application of blockchain and distributed ledger technology in logistics tracking services. The ministry is now seeking public feedback on these standards to gather opinions from various sectors of society.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Bitcoin Buyers Return as Spot Taker CVD Flips to Buy Dominance
data.description:
CryptoQuant reports that Bitcoin’s Spot Taker CVD has turned buy-dominant, suggesting aggressive buyers are returning and market sentiment is shifting toward demand recovery.
source: https://btcusa.com/cryptoquant-bitcoin-buyers-return-as-spot-taker-cvd-flips-to-buy-dominance/

data.title: CFTC Grants No-Action Relief to Multiple Prediction Markets
data.description:
The CFTC granted narrow no-action relief to four prediction markets, reducing immediate enforcement risk.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cftc-grants-no-action-relief-to-multiple-prediction-markets/

data.title: Trump’s Crypto Regulator Pick Heads to Senate Floor for Crucial Vote
data.description:
Michael Selig's Senate confirmation vote arrives as the CFTC withdraws its 2020 virtual currency guidance, approves spot crypto trading on futures exchanges, and launches a pilot program accepting Bitcoin, Ether, and USDC as derivatives collateral.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trumps-crypto-regulator-pick-heads-to-senate-floor-for-crucial-vote/

data.title: Kamino co-founder: Will launch fixed-rate and fixed-term lending products to promote on-chain interest rate price discovery.
data.description: At the Solana Breakpoint conference, Mariu, co-founder of Kamino, the Solana ecosystem liquidity protocol, announced that Kamino will soon launch fixed-rate, fixed-term lending products. Users will be able to choose their lending rate and term and transact according to the corresponding conditions. Mariu pointed out that this mechanism helps institutions seeking to clarify financing costs participate in the on-chain lending market, while also providing a stable, lockable interest rate spread for various asset circulation and arbitrage strategies. Kamino is collaborating with FalX (one of the major brokers in its market), with a key component being the "lending intention" mechanism. This mechanism allows borrowers and lenders to place orders and match transactions at their desired interest rates, thereby achieving more accurate interest rate price discovery on-chain and gradually forming an on-chain yield curve.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions Plans Blockchain-Based Stock Offering
data.description: According to PANews, Figure Technology Solutions has recently submitted a registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the issuance of blockchain-based stocks. These stocks will be traded natively on blockchain infrastructure, allowing holders to manage and trade them in a decentralized environment.

data.title: Indian Central Bank Deputy Governor Highlights Limited Role of Stablecoins in Transactional Economy
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Deputy Governor of the Reserve Bank of India has expressed concerns regarding the role of stablecoins in a transactional economy. He stated that stablecoins have a very limited function in such an economy and warned that their use could increase the risk of dollarization.
